linting.notes: Pre-commit hooks are the primary linting mechanism. Run 'uv run pre-commit run --all-files' to execute all linters. Ruff handles Python linting and formatting, yamllint handles YAML files.

testing.framework: Go testing with gomega/testify for e2e tests; no Python tests
testing.notes: No Python unit tests exist. Only Go e2e tests that require a live OpenShift cluster with RHOAI. Tests validate end-to-end pipeline execution, not individual Python components. Cannot be run in isolated container.

gating_checks.name: pipeline-up-to-date
gating_checks.command: uv run make pipeline && git diff --exit-code

gating_checks.name: requirements-validation
gating_checks.command: Check if requirements.txt matches pyproject.toml when either changes

ci.notes: The pre_commit.yaml workflow runs on pull_request and is gating. It validates: (1) all pre-commit hooks pass, (2) pipeline.yaml is up-to-date with pipeline.py, (3) requirements.txt is in sync with pyproject.toml. The build-main.yml workflow only runs on main branch pushes and builds container images.

build.notes: Project uses UV for dependency management. 'uv sync' creates a virtual environment and installs dependencies. 'uv sync --group lint' adds the lint group (ruff, pre-commit). 'make pipeline' generates the pipeline.yaml from pipeline.py.

conventions.import_style: Ruff enforces import sorting via pre-commit hook with --select I flag
conventions.notes: No Python test conventions as no Python tests exist. Pre-commit enforces trailing whitespace, end-of-file-fixer, YAML validity, merge conflict detection, and private key detection.

lint_commands.notes: All hooks passed: trailing-whitespace, end-of-file-fixer, check-yaml, check-merge-conflict, detect-private-key, ruff, ruff-format, yamllint
Found 2 lint violations: unused import in eval/mt_bench.py:4, f-string without placeholder in training/components.py:183

container_recipe.notes: No Python unit tests exist. Go e2e tests require OpenShift cluster infrastructure and cannot be validated in container. UV package manager must be installed via install script. Pre-commit hooks install themselves on first run.

validation.summary: install OK, lint OK (pre-commit passed, but ruff check found 2 violations), format OK, build OK, no Python tests exist

gaps: No Python unit tests - cannot validate Python code changes functionally
No integration tests that can run in isolation
Go e2e tests require full OpenShift cluster with RHOAI - cannot run in container
Current codebase has 2 ruff lint violations (unused import, f-string issue) that pre-commit doesn't catch in --fix mode
No way to test individual Python modules or functions
